summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of GitStack SaaS batch improvements completed. All 14 features tested and verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections including Hero, ViralFeatures, RepoOfTheDay, TopicsGrid, TrendingSection, CommunityStacks, NewsletterSignup
Logo SVG renders correctly in header (custom stacked layers design with git branch symbol)

12 topic categories visible with high repo counts (AI Agents 333, UI/UX 275, Automation 293, Data & Analytics 218, Payments 137, Authentication 112, Email & Messaging 88, CMS 83, Mobile Dev 66, Testing & QA 31, Web3 12, Self-Hosted 173)
Footer shows 4 columns: Brand (GitStack logo + description), AI Tools (5 links), Explore (4 links), Built By (Bedaant + Atul info)
Footer LinkedIn links point to correct URLs - Bedaant: linkedin.com/in/bedaant-srivastav-18510a120/, Atul: linkedin.com/in/atul-raj-sharan-03b356a2/
Collections page shows 6 collection cards with difficulty badges and completion times
Clicking collection navigates to /collections/{id} and shows tools with numbered steps (tested saas-waitlist collection)
Collection detail shows tool name, difficulty badge, stars (8.2k, 16.8k), setup time, Quick Setup steps, GitHub link
Tools page shows filter button, search input, and '1134+ indexed' count
Clicking Filters shows difficulty buttons (All/Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced), language dropdown, sort options (Name A-Z, Most Stars, Least Stars, Easiest First)
Filtering by Beginner shows only Beginner tools (19 of 200 curated tools)
Clear filters button appears when filters are active
Founder Stacks page at /founder-stacks shows 6 real stack cards (Cal.com 28k, Supabase 62k, n8n 35k, Appwrite 38k, Plane 25k, Documenso 6k) - NOT 'Coming soon'
Dead Tool Detector page loads with title, input textarea, and submit button
Stack Generator page loads with title, input textarea, and submit button
Trending section tabs (Top this week, Today) work and switch content
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed for public pages. Google OAuth is Emergent-managed.
seed_data_creation: None - app calls POST /api/seed on mount to ensure data exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 requested features verified working. Key data-testids confirmed: collections-title, collection-header, collection-tool-0, toggle-filters, filter-panel, filter-diff-beginner, filter-language, sort-stars-desc, results-count, clear-filters, founder-stacks-title, founder-stack-*, footer-linkedin-bedaant, footer-linkedin-atul, footer-email-bedaant, topic-email-messaging, topic-selfhosted. Footer has 4 columns with team info. Founder Stacks shows 6 real stacks with GitHub star counts. Collection detail pages show numbered tools with setup steps. Tools page has working filters with difficulty, language, and sort options.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All batch improvements working correctly.
